blocks.text: Glimt stun Inter — PSG, Monaco and Madrid face the reckoning
Bodø/Glimt's 2-1 elimination of Inter in Milan sent Norwegian football into rapture. Tonight, four more CL second legs — and the PSG–Monaco and Madrid–Benfica ties remain very much alive.

blocks.label: ⚽ Also tonight — Champions League
items: ⚽ 18:45 — Atalanta vs Dortmund — Dortmund lead 2-0, Bergamo needs two goals to level
⚽ 21:00 — Juventus vs Galatasaray — Galatasaray through barring a historic collapse

blocks.label: Weekend must-watches
items: 🎿 Thu 16:05 — Biathlon WC Kontiolahti — Bø, Lægreid and Røiseland open in Finland
⚽ Sat 16:00 — Liverpool vs West Ham — Anfield, title race, Arsenal watching
⚽ Sat 16:15 — Barcelona vs Villarreal — Camp Nou, La Liga title race ★
